issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were triggering double tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot, which caused leads to qualify for workflows multiple times. HubSpot support was engaged and resolved the underlying association/filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks from the affected deal records.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper suppression filters to unenroll contacts upon reaching terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually complete or delete any outstanding post-referral tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. This was because 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to include the Offer Accepted deal stage.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC workflow tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing incorrect loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated LO. The affected deal was showing Paul as the LO in outgoing emails when it should have been Julie Yocum. The issue was identified as a product-level problem and resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction or relevant automated emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their assigned tasks. The issue affected deals where no lender was attached, which is standard for MRC deals. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was confirmed fixed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are generated.
